promoted_facts.fact: New Term Policy effective January 1, 2025. Apply in year 16. VP recommends in year 17. New Term Committee decides (final).
Royalty on new term franchise remains same as previous rate (not increased to 5% automatically)
If not offered new term, alternative offer may allow sale to qualified buyer with legal release required
Interest on delinquencies: highest rate allowed by law or 15%, monthly compounding
General liability insurance minimum $5M per occurrence / $5M aggregate
McDonald's has immediate right to enter and take possession on material breach (§20(a))
Franchisee must indemnify and defend McDonald's for all claims arising from restaurant operations (§24)
Cost of enforcement: McDonald's entitled to recover attorneys' fees if it prevails (§23)
Washington AOD: McDonald's removed no-poach provision from franchise agreements
Restructuring charges: Accelerating the Organization total $63.6M since inception; $4.4M accrued at year-end
$2.4B payable to parent converted to equity Feb 17, 2025 (subsequent event)
